title: Protein structure prediction with AlphaFold-Multimer
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"83b0g","text":"This protocol describes the protein structure prediction with AlphaFold-Multimer.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Protein sequences were downloaded from the Uniprot server.
A locally installed version of AlphaFold-Multimer was used for structure prediction with 5 models per prediction followed by Amber relaxation.
Interaction scores (ipDT) and diagnostic plots (PAE plot and pLDDT plot) as well as the generated structures were manually inspected.
Predicted structures were visualized with ChimeraX-1.8.
creator: Elias Adriaenssens
